'''''Accuser''''' was a modified [[720 light freighter/Legends|720 light freighter]] owned by the [[Tiss'shar]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] and [[Assassin/Legends|assassin]] [[Kal-tan-shi]]. He acquired it from one of his targets in the [[Lesser Plooriod Cluster/Legends|Lesser Plooriod Cluster]]. It was modified by his former employers, [[House Paramexor]], but he left their employ to pursue a solo career before the modifications were completed.<ref name="AIR" />

Kal-tan-shi himself was not a skilled mechanic, so he tried avoid damaging his ship while pursuing his prey, and did not finish the modifications himself. Though he earned enough [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] bringing [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] fugitives to the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] authorities to afford to pay someone else to modify ''Accuser'', it was believed he never found the time to do so.<ref name="AIR" />
